# Templates

This folder stores reusable starting points for course and project documents.

Use templates as inputs, not final deliverables. Completed documents belong in:
- `reports/proposal/`
- `reports/progress_reports/`
- `reports/final_report/`

When creating a new draft, prefer date-prefixed filenames such as:
- `2026-03-25_proposal-draft-v1.md`
- `2026-04-08_progress-report-1.docx`
